metadata.title: LRMT Seminar - Paper Repository
metadata.description: Flat, tag-based repository of all papers considered for the Low-Resource Machine Translation seminar. Papers are not nested by week - weeks reference paper IDs. This separation keeps the paper list modular and reusable across seminar editions.
metadata.notes: The 'id' field is permanent and should never be changed between versions - it is the stable cross-reference key. The 'citationkey' field is a suggested BibTeX key and can be adjusted by individual users (e.g. to match their Zotero setup). Tags use a controlled vocabulary: see tag_vocabulary below.

papers.header: Foundational SMT corpus
papers.title: Europarl: A Parallel Corpus for Statistical Machine Translation
papers.reference_full: Koehn, P. (2005). Europarl: A Parallel Corpus for Statistical Machine Translation. MT Summit.

papers.header: Introduction to NMT
papers.title: Neural Machine Translation
papers.reference_full: Koehn, P. (2020). Neural Machine Translation. Cambridge University Press.

papers.reference_full: Vaswani, A., Shazeer, N., Parmar, N., et al. (2017). Attention is All You Need. NeurIPS.
